; rmkit-cn: Inject zh_CN option into System Language selector

AFFECT /qml/device/view/settings/LanguageAndKeyboard.qml
    TRAVERSE DeviceKeyboardNavigationHandler#root > Component#languageDialog
        REPLACE SelectionComponent WITH {
            SelectionComponent {
                title: qsTr("System language")
                objectName: "SystemLanguageDialog"
                model: {
                    var base = languageSettings.availableLanguageCodes
                    var arr = []
                    for (var i = 0; i < base.length; i++) arr.push(base[i])
                    if (arr.indexOf("zh_CN") === -1) arr.push("zh_CN")
                    return arr
                }
                selectedIndex: model.indexOf(languageSettings.languageCode)
                display: (modelData) => {
                    if (modelData === "zh_CN") return "\u4e2d\u6587\uff08\u7b80\u4f53\uff09"
                    return root.languageSettings.getLanguageDisplayName(modelData)
                }
                onSelected: (selection) => {
                    console.warn("XOVI-LANG: user picked", selection)
                    languageSettings.languageCode = selection
                    subpageLoader.sourceComponent = null
                }
                onRejected: subpageLoader.sourceComponent = null
            }
        }
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
